title: Cataclysm: Spellbooks & BetterCombat - Compatibility
description: This is a datapack/mod for compatibility between Cataclysm: Spellbooks and Better Combat
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

**If you've play with Cataclysm: Spellbooks and Better Combat, you may have run into a problem where weapons from Cataclysm Spellbooks didn't work properly with the new combat system from Better Combat. This mod/datapack fills this gap between it, allowing players to use the unique weapons with the dynamic combat mechanics, without any problems!**

**Features**
- _Full Weapon Compatibility:_ This mod ensures complete integration of weapons from the Cataclysm mod with Better Combat's fighting mechanics.
- _Attack Range Customization:_ You can customize each weapon to your liking, including attack range or weapon type. The files include notes on which values to edit, so even inexperienced users won't make a mistake!


_This mod/datapack can be used in mod packs and modified as you see fit. If you need help adding compatibility for weapons from another mod, I'm ready to help! Feel free to contact me on Discord: @rymusov :)_

[Report issue](https://github.com/rymusov/rymusov-mods-issues/issues) [Support me!](https://ko-fi.com/rymusov)
